2326120.name: Radiated Life
2326120.description:
Gameplay:
Survive in a post-apocalyptic world as Satan, and lead your people to build a habitable base. But watch out, God will stop at nothing to make your job harder. Dangers will be thrown your way, but with careful planning and strategy, you can guide your people to thrive in the midst of chaos.

Twist:
What sets this game apart is the unique window-moving mechanic. As you move the window, the game world is revealed, giving you a glimpse of what's happening beyond the confines of your base. This adds a new layer of strategy and immersion to the gameplay, as you must carefully balance resource management with the risks of venturing into the unknown.

About:
This game is for those who love survival and strategy games with a twist. With sometimes challenging gameplay, with quite hard resource management. It is designed to be enjoyable for most ages that have tried video games before
2326120.supported_languages:
英语*
